lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: [Ah, hello there, laddie/Ah, hello there, lassie/Ah, hello there]! I've just dug up an old treasure chest of mine.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Problem is, these old hands o'mine aren't as useful as they used t'be, and the lock on that chest is a little bit too fiddly for ol' Cap'n Arnav. Could you help me out?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll help you unlock your chest.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: There are three columns. What you need to do for me is to match up each picture with the word underneath the column, and then unlock the chest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sorry.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Ah, well done matey, that's the right combination. Here, have a little somethin' for helpin' me out.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Arrr! That be nowhere near close! Did ye not listen the first time around?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I must have misunderstood your instructions. Could I hear them again please?

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Right, right. What you need to do is click on the arrows to roll the cylinders round to the different items.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: When the items in the middle row all match the words written under the column then you'll have solved the lock.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Is that a little clearer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Certainly. Let me try again.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Arrr! I'd better find someone else.

sections.title: Talking to him after the event

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Arrr, I'd better be off.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Arrr, you're not the person I be needin'.

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Avast there, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Ahoy, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Parley wi' me, my old fruit!

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: I needs yer help, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: I got treasure here, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Shiver me' timbers, are you ignoring me?

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Will ye help an old pirate, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: I knows somethin' you should knows, [player name].

lines.speaker: Capt' Arnav
lines.text: Maybe later.
